base_ladder.text: A rusted fire tower rises from the ridge crest. The ladder is intact but {{ladder_condition}}. A locked storage box is bolted to the base.

choices.label: Climb the tower to the observation deck.

observation_deck.text: The observation deck gives a panoramic view of the wastes. A weather kit and sealed supply cache are still strapped to the wall mounts — never collected.

choices.label: Force the observer's locker under the window bench.

observer_locker.text: Inside the locker: a sealed personal kit, emergency flares, and a hand radio. The radio is dead but the rest is usable.

rung_failure.text: A rung snaps under your weight. You catch yourself but slam hard into the ladder. The bruises are deep.

wind_gust.text: A gust rocks the tower. You grab the rail but lose your footing. Heart pounding, it takes long minutes to recover.
